title: Tapered Language Models
abstract: Tapered Language Models delivers solid reasoning and generation capabilities through a straightforward API. It is not another ChatGPT wrapper — the architecture has real depth. Boost your productiv...
abstract_zh: 讲真，Tapered Language Models 这个模型值得你花时间了解一下。不是那种"又一个ChatGPT壳子"的路数，底层有真东西。API接上就能干活，不废话。
